term: Made a lot of money off of it
pronunciation: /meɪd ə lɒt əv ˈmʌni ɒf əv ɪt/
englishDefinitions: earned a large amount of money from something
examples: He made a lot of money off of it after selling the app.
The company made a lot of money off of the new product.
She made a lot of money off of her first book.
